response.justification: Bogdan significantly exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with ~27 years of software engineering across multiple domains and platforms, and demonstrates strong technical depth and entrepreneurial experience through GISCollective. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with recognized AI/ML expertise and director-level strategic leadership in AI, neither of which are clearly demonstrated. His recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work shows movement toward the domain but lacks the deep AI product-building experience or formal AI training the position preferentially requires.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 27+ years in software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Demonstrates entrepreneurial credibility as founder of GISCollective, a sustained open-source platform for 16+ years serving conservation organizations
Strong full-stack technical foundation with fluency in multiple languages (TypeScript, D, Java, Swift, C#) and modern infrastructure (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS)
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field; recent AI experience limited to infrastructure tooling (MCP) rather than demonstrated AI product development or strategy
No clear evidence of director-level individual contributor responsibilities or strategic advisory experience at enterprise scale
Resume lacks evidence of recognized AI expertise, published research, or products built with AI—core preferred qualifications for this AI Strategy role
